articles.title: Binance Coin (BNB) Flips Solana As Meme Coin Momentum Shifts
articles.description: Binance Coin (BNB) price has overtaken Solana (SOL) in the crypto market capitalization, becoming the fifth-largest cryptocurrency. As of March 29th, BNB’s market capitalization has reached about $86 billion, surpassing SOL’s $64 billion. In line with this development, market experts and traders are now closely monitoring both coins to determine their next move
